mapper.select: select dp.id, dp.activation, dp.condition_type, dp.discount_type, dp.discount_value, dp.end_at, dp.policy_name, dp.start_at from cinema_kiosk.discount_policy dp where id = #{no}
select dp.id, dp.activation, dp.condition_type, dp.discount_type, dp.discount_value, dp.end_at, dp.policy_name, dp.start_at from cinema_kiosk.discount_policy dp
